nodes.name: Snowy-crowned robin-chat
nodes.summary: Snowy-crowned robin-chat（Cossypha niveicapilla）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Snowy-crowned robin-chat。

nodes.name: Cossypha
nodes.summary: Cossypha（Cossypha）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联8种鸟类，如Blue-shouldered robin-chat、Rüppell's robin-chat、White-browed robin-chat等8种鸟类。

nodes.name: Snowy-crowned robin-chat
nodes.summary: The snowy-crowned robin-chat (Cossypha niveicapilla) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is also known as the snowy-headed robin-chat. Its disjunct range extends across the northern half of Sub-Saharan Africa (rare in the Horn of Africa). Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest, subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, and moist savanna. References
